variants.title: Fleetguard AF55802 Cabin Air Filter Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P228498
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF55802 Cabin Air Filter Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P228498
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF55802 panel cabin air filter provides clean air in the cab which means a clean work environment.  Breathing cleaner air can lead to longer and more productive working hours.

variants.title: Donaldson P228498 Air Panel
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P228498 Air Panel is designed to provide reliable performance in air panel applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
